step_title: Community v2 api 健康恢复
summary: 当前轮次 g1-step4-api-health-recovery 已确认 api 恢复健康：compose 状态正常、日志已无 app.schemas.sync 导入错误、容器内导入检查通过、/api/v1/health 返回 200；但 webhook 在 api 恢复后仍未恢复，首个剩余错误为 Request failed for /agents: agent name already exists，因此系统暂不能继续 live acceptance。
blocker: Webhook did not recover after api became healthy; first remaining webhook error is Request failed for /agents: agent name already exists.
tests: HTTP controller evidence chain for g1-step4-api-health-recovery
docker compose logs api without ModuleNotFoundError: app.schemas.sync
docker compose exec -T api python imports for app.schemas.sync/app.services.group_session/app.main
skill host-file sha256 observation for community-runtime-v0.mjs and community_integration.mjs
